zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol於1394年出生在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞時，她的父親Francis De Baux64歲，母親Sueva Orsini34歲。她於1405年5月與Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年11月15日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年75歲，埋葬在法國帕-德-卡拉斯爾坎普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol于1394年出生在意大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞时，她的父亲Francis De Baux64岁，母亲Sueva Orsini34岁。她于1405年5月与Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年11月15日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年75岁，埋葬在法国帕-德-卡拉斯爾坎普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hauck
meanings: German: from a dialect variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Hugo (see Hugh ). Compare Haug .

variants.name: Houx
meanings: French (northern) and Walloon: topographic name from French houx ‘holly’, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, for example in Eure-et-Loir (France) and in the province of Namur in Belgium (Wallonia).
German: rare northern variant of   Haux   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol was born in 1394, in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy, her father, Francis De Baux, was 64 and her mother, Sueva Orsini, was 34. She married Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol in May 1405. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 15 November 1469, in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol est née en 1394, à Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie, son père, Francis De Baux, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Sueva Orsini, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol en mai 1405. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 novembre 1469, à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol 1394 in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis De Baux 64 und ihre Mutter Sueva Orsini 34. Sie hat im Mai 1405 Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. November 1469 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol è nata il nel 1394 nel Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, sua padre, Francis De Baux, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Sueva Orsini, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol nel maggio 1405. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1469, nel Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Polが1394年にイタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアで生まれた時，父Francis De Bauxは64歳，母Sueva Orsiniは34歳であった。1405年5月にPierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年11月15日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントで75歳で死去し，フランスプアス-デ-カレイスセルカンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol(이)가 1394년 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis De Baux(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sueva Orsini(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1405년 5월 Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 11월 15일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 세르캠프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol nasceu em 1394, em Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Francis De Baux, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Sueva Orsini, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol em maio de 1405. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1469, em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol родилась в 1394 г. в местности андря, бари, пугля, Италия, её отцу по имени Francis De Baux было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Sueva Orsini, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol май 1405 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 15 ноября 1469 г. в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности киркамп, пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol nació en 1394, en Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Francis De Baux, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Sueva Orsini, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol en mayo de 1405. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1469, en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
